# Security Checklist: Search, Accessibility, Deep Links, Docs Validation

**Purpose**: Validate DOC-010 security requirement completeness, clarity, consistency, and measurable review evidence for safe docs validation, browser smoke, command snippets, manifest/payload checks, and CI behavior.
**Created**: 2026-06-19
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are automated validation safety boundaries defined for generated reference checks, docs quality checks, safe-aids checks, browser smoke, and PR Checks docs-gate behavior? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, Spec §FR-011, Contract §Docs Validation Path]
- [x] CHK002 Are browser-side local command execution, local-user-file reads, user JSON inspection, and hidden permission grants all explicitly excluded from automated docs validation and browser smoke requirements? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Plan §Security/Safety Planning Boundaries]
- [x] CHK003 Does the spec define safe command-snippet validation as source-backed static inspection and copyable-guidance review only, without executing snippets or accepting user-supplied payloads? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Plan §Testing]
- [x] CHK004 Are Playwright smoke requirements complete enough to prevent live plugin installs, destructive actions, analytics, external production telemetry, or unintended network navigation while still allowing a local docs preview? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Plan §Security/Safety Planning Boundaries]
- [x] CHK005 Are manifest and payload consistency checks required to avoid exposing local absolute paths, sensitive values, environment values, or user-specific filesystem details in logs, artifacts, and PR packet evidence? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Spec §PR Review Packet Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is the distinction between dependency installation in CI and forbidden live plugin or marketplace install testing clear enough for PR Checks implementation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011, Contract §PR Checks Docs Gate]
- [x] CHK007 Are command-snippet, manifest, payload, and generated-reference validation outputs required to use actionable repo-relative source references instead of local machine paths? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Plan §Testing]
- [ ] CHK008 Is Playwright baseURL scope clear enough to test logical docs routes without asserting against local filesystem URLs or production-only routes? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010, Contract §Browser Smoke]
- [x] CHK009 Are manual-only actions distinguished from automated validation actions so contributors do not interpret copyable guidance as a CI execution contract? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK010 Do the spec, plan, quickstart, and contracts consistently forbid networked, destructive, live install, browser-side local command execution, and local-user-file inspection behavior? [Consistency, Spec §FR-011, Plan §Constraints, Quickstart §Forbidden In Automated Validation]
- [ ] CHK011 Do safe-aids accessibility requirements align with security boundaries so copy buttons and selectors expose guidance without executing commands or reading user state? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-011]
- [x] CHK012 Do PR Checks docs-gate requirements preserve plugin test semantics without introducing new permission, credential, or marketplace access requirements for docs-site-only PRs? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Plan §Security/Safety Planning Boundaries]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK013 Can reviewers objectively judge that automated docs validation avoided command execution, local file inspection, local JSON inspection, live install tests, destructive commands, and hidden permission grants? [Resolved, Spec §SC-005, Spec §PR Review Packet Requirements, Plan §PR review packet source]
- [x] CHK014 Can smoke evidence be reviewed without exposing local paths, sensitive values, traces of user state, or broad browser artifacts outside the compact `docs-site-smoke-evidence` contract? [Resolved, Spec §SC-006, Spec §PR Review Packet Requirements]
- [ ] CHK015 Can CI security boundaries be judged from stable job names, skip messages, command lists, and artifact names without requiring access to a maintainer's local environment? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005, Contract §PR Checks Docs Gate]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK016 Are validation encounters with unsafe commands, local user files, user JSON, destructive cleanup, networked marketplace behavior, and external platform drift all covered as explicit out-of-scope or manual-only scenarios? [Resolved, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries]
- [x] CHK017 Are safe fallback requirements defined when a command snippet, manifest field, or payload value cannot be source-backed without reading local user state? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries]
- [ ] CHK018 Are security-relevant known gaps or deferred work required to be recorded in reviewer-visible PR packet sections with rollback or fallback notes? [Coverage, Spec §FR-013, Spec §PR Review Packet Requirements]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: browser-side command execution, local file and user JSON inspection, hidden permission grants, live install/destructive CI behavior, source-backed command snippets, manifest/payload output hygiene, and Playwright/docs-validator network boundaries.
- Depth level: Standard reviewer gate.
- Actor/timing: PR reviewer before implementation tasks begin.

## Re-run Verification

- [x] CHK019 Are automated validation inputs now constrained to checked-in source, generated docs output, and local docs preview without user-local files, user JSON/config/cache, browser profiles, environment values, or hidden permission grants? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries]
- [x] CHK020 Are command snippets, install guidance, rollback guidance, manifest references, payload references, and generated-reference facts now constrained to source-backed static inspection and copyable-guidance review? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Plan §Security/Safety Planning Boundaries]
- [x] CHK021 Are Playwright smoke and smoke artifacts now scoped to the configured docs-site baseURL, six logical routes, compact artifact evidence, and sanitized repo-relative output? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Spec §SC-006]
- [x] CHK022 Does `validate-docs` now preserve plugin semantics without adding new workflow permissions, credentials, marketplace access, plugin runtime execution, or plugin-matrix fan-out for docs-site-only PRs? [Resolved, Spec §Validation Safety Boundaries, Plan §Security/Safety Planning Boundaries]
